title: MAIP Content Schema
description: JSON Schema for MAIP protocol content data structures, including content formats, items, and provenance.

ContentFormat.title: ContentFormat
ContentFormat.description: The format of a content item.

ContentProvenance.title: ContentProvenance
ContentProvenance.description: Indicates how the content was produced or originated.

ThinkingTrace.title: ThinkingTrace
ThinkingTrace.description: A record of reasoning process associated with the content.

topic.description: The topic or subject of this thinking trace.

reasoning.description: The reasoning process or chain of thought.

conclusion.description: The conclusion reached through the reasoning.

timestamp.description: The date-time when this thinking trace was recorded.

confidence.description: The confidence level in the conclusion, from 0 to 1.

ContentItem.title: ContentItem
ContentItem.description: A content item created and shared within the MAIP protocol.

id.description: Unique identifier for this content item.

title.description: The title of the content item.

body.description: The body content of the item.

creator.description: The DID of the creator of this content item.

tags.description: Tags for categorizing the content item.

created.description: The date-time when this content item was created.

updated.description: The date-time when this content item was last updated.

visibility.description: The visibility level of this content item.

signature.description: A cryptographic signature over the content item.
